violations.description: Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Interior panel of ice machine was cut in half due to previous ice drop issues.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale/yellow debris build up at upper interior/ice drop of ice machine.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Kitchen dishwasher found at 0ppm Chlorine. *COS-Primed lines for 2 cycles, fixed to 50ppm Chlorine. -Bar dishwasher found with 0ppm chlorine. *COS-Fed chlorine line into suction tube, primed dishwasher for 2+ cycles. Unit found at 50ppm chlorine before departure.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use portion cups stored in cardboard flat next to ice machine.--Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Cases of gloves and portion cups stored on floor in office.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Build up of debris behind cook line. -Debris/odor at floor drain next to ice machine. -Some dust debris at walk in cooler fans.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Pizza sauce (mixed in-house) left out at room temperature between uses at prep table found with temperature of 58F. *Must be held under 41F or less OR time stamped for disposal every 4 hours. -Red bull fridge found with food internal temperature of 47. *Unit found at knob setting of 3, staff turned to max cold 7 while on-site with intent of future holding with knob at setting of 5. -Server condiments refrigerator found with coconut scampi sauce at 45F. *Unit turned down by half a setting from 4.5 to a 5 on th eknob setting while on-site.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -Observed cook plate bread with bare hands.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Portion cup left in olives to be used as a scoop.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Cheesecake in server refrigerator dated 11/22/25. *Disposed of immediately.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Carbon build up/residue at bottom interior of oven. -Grease residue at sides of cooking equipment. -Debris in storage bin for clean utensils. -Residue/debris at lower shelves in dish pit area. -Ice build up at walk in freezer fans/drain pan. *Sounds like it may be affecting the fan blades. -Server container used for ice scoops has limescale residue at interior bottom.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Bartender is setting clean dishes from dishwasher onto cloth above dishwasher.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Ware wash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Kitchen dishwasher has a build up of limescale/grease at interior surfaces.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Kitchen had 1 set of food trays that were not stored inverted.*Corrected on-site. -Server station has plastic spoons and plastic knives that are not stored inverted.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
